findings.rationale: This claim states a percentage reduction in Scope 3 emissions but does not provide the baseline value or baseline year for this reduction.
findings.quote:
34.6% reduction in Scope 3 greenhouse
gas emiss ions

findings.rationale: This statement provides percentage reductions for Scope 1, 2, and 3 emissions but does not explicitly state the baseline value or baseline year for these reductions within this sentence, even though it's mentioned elsewhere.
findings.quote: Our efforts to reduce greenhouse gas emissions along our val ue chain and optimise resource use have continued to pay off. During the year our greenhouse gas emissions in Scope 1 and 2 decreased by 41 percent and in Scope 3 by 34.6 percent.
